name: Cuba Libre
directions: Mix rum, lime juice, and cola together in a pitcher.
Pour over ice into tall glasses and garnish with lime wedge.

name: Caribbean Breeze
directions: Fill a tall glass with ice.
Pour all ingredients over ice.
Sir and serve.

name: Caribbean Martini
directions: Shake ingredients over ice.
Pour into martini glass.

name: Caribbean Martini
directions: Shake ingredients and pour over ice.

name: Caribbean Sunrise
directions: Combine the lemon juice, orange juice and sugar in a shaker and muddle briefly until the sugar is dissolved.
Add the rum, and several drops of grenadine (at least 5!), and some cracked ice.
Cover and shake for about 10 seconds, or when the shaker is quite cold.
Strain into a chilled, 5 ounce whisky sour glass.

name: Mojito Mixer
directions: Mix the sugar and water in a medium saucepan. Heat on medium high and bring to a boil.
Cut the limes in half and give the mint leaves a crush in your hands and add to the sugar and water mixture.
Turn heat down to medium and let simmer for five minutes to steep the flavor out of the mint and limes.
Pour syrup through a strainer and chill.
Keep the syrup refrigerated.
To use this syrup to make a Mojito, pour about 1 tablespoon (give or take) over ice, add your rum and club soda, mix well and serve in a chilled glass.

Now I'm not giving anything exact here because I have always eyeballed it when I make mojitos. Just don't use too much syrup, you should be able to figure out a good ratio to fit your taste after a few tries.

name: Captain Courageous
directions: Pour the coconut rum into a collins glass half-filled with ice cubes.
Add pineapple juice, and stir.
Float dark rum on top, and enjoy.

name: Tropical Breeze (Cocktail)
directions: Add all ingredients to a shaker.
Shake for 10-12 seconds.
Pour/strain into a chilled glass and enjoy!

name: Rum Collins
directions: Stir together lime juice, sugar and rum in a measuring cup until sugar is dissolved.
Fill a tall glass with ice.
Pour mixture over ice and add a splash of soda water.
Garnish with lime slices.

name: Havana Cooler
directions: Combine rum, ice cubes and mint in a short (old-fashioned) glass.
Top with ginger ale.

name: Captain Morgan Cuba Libre
directions: 1. COMBINE ALL THE INGREDIENTS IN AN ICE FILLED GLASS.
2. STIR TO COMBINE.
3. GARNISH WITH A LIME WEDGE.
